Too many tabs? With Stash, batch save, quickly stash, easily recover.

Too many tabs? With Stash, batch save, quickly stash, easily recover.
Stash makes it easier to save your window(tabs). And you can found them on stash list. By clicking the item, the tabs will be recovered.
Play, loop & bookmark multiple portions of a YouTube video.

Sample Use Case
‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾ 
Suppose a YouTube video is an album of 5 songs and you only want to listen to the 1st and the 3rd songs in it. Using this extension, you can specify the intervals (segments) of those songs, and only those portions will be played.

Specifying Multiple Intervals
‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾
An input box appears just below the video. There, you should specify the intervals as a comma separated list. Example: "00:00-00:30, 5:00-5:30" (without quotes) specifies two intervals, namely, the first 30 seconds and then the 30 seconds after the 5-minute mark. On clicking 'Apply', these intervals are played one after another.

To make it easier to specify the intervals, two buttons 'Start' and 'End' are provided. This is how you should use them: Click 'Start' at time xx:xx. Then click 'End' at time yy:yy. This will automatically copy the interval "xx:xx - yy:yy" into the input box. Repeat this to add several intervals.

**NEW:** Keyboard shortcuts. Ctrl+Shift+< for Start, Ctrl+Shift+> for End, and Ctrl+Shift+' for Apply. Also, Ctrl+Shift+; is provided to set end time equal to video's end time. These are configurable in Settings. (Mac users: Cmd instead of Ctrl)

Bookmarking
‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾
You can also 'bookmark' the intervals that you have just applied (by clicking the 'Bookmark!' button). Next time you play the same video, those intervals are automatically loaded from bookmarks and only the corresponding portions are played. You can use this feature to essentially create a whole playlist of video segments (by first creating the playlist on YouTube, and then bookmarking the desired portions for individual videos in it).

Clicking the button 'All B.s' opens up a side pane where all the previously bookmarked interval lists are shown. If there are multiple lists for the same video, then the most recently added interval-list will load automatically. Here, you can also manually delete a bookmark.

**NEW** You can export all these bookmarks using the 'Export' button. This downloads an html file, which you can import into another browser which has this extension already installed. Make sure to move the imported bookmarks into the "YouTubePartsBookmarks" folder there (which should already be present, since the extension is already installed).

Looping
‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾
Finally, there's an option to play the sequence of portions on a loop.

Configurable Options
‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾
Click this extension's icon and click options. (Alternatively, go to 'Manage Extensions', click this extension's 'Details' and click 'Extension options'.) There you can configure the following:
1. Keyboard shortcuts for the Start and End buttons
2. Set looping as the default behavior
3. (Experimental feature) Allow up to 1 decimal place for seconds in the input. This will let you specify more granular intervals, like "0:0 - 0:0.9"

After saving the settings, refresh existing YouTube tabs if any, for the changes to reflect.

Miscellaneous
‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾‾
- Timestamps can be in the hh:mm:ss format (e.g. "00:00:00-1:00:00" means the first 1 hour), or the mm:ss format, or just in seconds ("0-3600" also means the first 1 hour).
- Intervals are ordered by their starting time. Overlapping intervals are merged.
- This extension stores all the saved interval lists in a dedicated bookmarks directory called 'YoutubePartsBookmarks'. Ensure not to delete or modify it.

Thanks to users for providing valuable feedback.
Quickly switch between customized search engines; Add a custom search engine in the right-click menu. New AI model support.

🚀 Now Powered by LLMs! Smarter, Faster, More Efficient Search

Integrated with leading global Large Language Models (LLMs)! Instantly summarize web content, ask intelligent questions, and generate quick insights—all within your browser. Effortlessly connect to OpenAI (ChatGPT, GPT-4), Azure OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, and more. Just add your API Key and enjoy AI-powered productivity anywhere on the web!

---

It supports configuring any search engine, similar to the search engine configuration in chrome settings, such as Baidu search, Bing search, JD search, Douban search, headline search, etc.
After configuration, support:

1. shortcut keys switch between search engines. 
For example, on the Baidu search page, press the shortcut key (configurable) to quickly switch to Google search without reentering the search term, and then press the shortcut key to quickly switch to Bing search.

2. click the plug-in pop-up menu in the upper right corner (shortcut keys can also be configured) to quickly switch to the specified search engine. 
If it is on the search engine page, it will automatically bring the search term and jump to the specified search result page; Otherwise, directly jump to the specified search results page.

3. support the configuration of search engines in the right-click menu. 
If only one search engine is configured, it is in the top-level menu, or multiple search engines can be configured. After selecting a text, right-click it, and "search for" selected text "using XX" will appear in the right-click menu

功能：
支持配置任意搜索引擎，类似chrome设置里面的搜索引擎配置，比如百度搜索、必应搜索、京东搜索、豆瓣搜索、头条搜索等等。
配置好后，支持：
1. 快捷键在搜索引擎间切换。比如在百度搜索页面，按下快捷键（可自己配置）快速切换为Google搜索，而无需重新输入检索词，再按下快捷键，快速切换为必应搜索。

2. 支持右上角点击插件弹出菜单（也可以配置快捷键），快速切换到指定搜索引擎。如果在搜索引擎页面，会自动带上检索词跳转到指定的搜索结果页；否则直接跳转到指定的搜索结果页面。

3. 支持配置右键菜单中的搜索引擎，如果只配置一个，则处于顶级菜单，也可以配置多个。选中文本后，点击右键，则右键菜单中出现『使用xx搜索"选中的文本"』
네이버페이 포인트 줍줍 시즌 2 (Npay Moa Season 2)
네이버페이 포인트를 쉽게 모을 수 있도록 도와주는 짠테크 프로그램입니다.

[ 1.3.0 ] 기존수집선택 을 저장하고, 1포인트만 수집하는 기능을 추가.
[ 1.2.4 ] 전체 클릭이 아닌 포인트를 체크 해서 적립 하도록 수정함
[ 1.2.3 ] 쿠팡광고에 대한 문구 추가
[ 1.2.2 ] 2025년 10월 8일 스타일쉬트 변경
[ 1.2.1 ] 2025년 9월 29일 네이버포인트 페이지 내부 버튼 오류로 인해 제거
[ 1.2.0 ] 2025년 6월 27일 네이버포인트 클릭 버튼 변경됨
[ 1.0.3 ] 2025년 6월 26일 네이버포인트 적립페이지 URL 및 내용이 변경 되어 업데이트 

네이버페이 포인트 혜택 페이지에 적립할수 있는 클릭을 찾아서 똑똑하고, 꼼꼼하게 자동클릭으로 적립 하여 드립니다.

그리고 완료시 화면으로 포인트가 적입이 되었다는것을 표현 했습니다.

"튜브다운" - 멜론 Top100 웹에서 바로 듣기 링크 ( https://www.tubedown.co.kr )

이 프로그램은 쿠팡파트너스 활동의 일환으로, 이에 따른 일정액의 수수료를 제공받습니다.
Sharp Tabs v3 - Best Open Source All-in-1 Tabs Manager (Vertical & Pop-up)!
Fully Free. Vertical Tabs. Instant Search. Advanced Suspend. AI Organize. Auto Session Backups. Duplicates. Workspaces. Much More!

You can use all the features in the pop up mode or in the sidebar mode! Has every tab management feature you can dream of while being very light and performant.

Please try it out, you won't regret it!

🚨🚨 2026-01-30: Great News 🚨🚨
🔊 Sharp Tabs is now free and fully open-source. 
Support & contributions appreciated to continue working on it but totally optional 😇

⭐ All I ask is that you please star the repo on github.com/maddada/sharptabs ⭐

Other big changes in v3
✅ Removed sharptabs.com/restore based tabs suspension to reduce required permissions, now only native tabs suspension is available.
✅ Reduced the requested permissions as much as possible to the bare minimum required.
✅ Removed all anonymous tracking for enabled settings.
✅ Made all features fully free and not require account. Only features that do require are AI based features (AI auto group, AI auto clean, AI auto group name) but you can add your own Gemini key to use these too!

====

Almost all of the extension's features are free and don't even require signing in.
You're welcome to use it for free as long as you like 😇
Please support me if you really like Sharp Tabs.

Learn more here: sharptabs.com/free-vs-paid

🏆 Why Sharp Tabs is better than all of the other tab management UIs and extensions:

• Focused on the most intuitive UX and design.
• Every swipe, action, and click was tuned over months of usability testing.
• Brings the best features from many extensions into 1.
• Lightweight and performant. Made with the latest tech and best practices.
• Highly customizable and theme-able to fit any set up.

⭐ Highlights:
• Comes with insanely fast and easy to use tabs search
• Speeds you pc by using the best tab suspending mechanism (with screenshot)
• Intelligent auto session back ups so you never lose your tabs & tab groups
• Awesome keyboard hotkeys for power users
• Recent Tabs Navigation (like Alt + Tab but for browser tabs!)
• AI Auto Group. AI Auto Cleanup. Auto Group Naming.
• Workspaces feature to organize tabs into different areas (Personal, Work, etc.)
• 2 modes: Popup for quick actions, Sidebar for more involved usage
• 1 click to show duplicate tabs so you can close them
• Easily select + drag & drop multiple tabs
• Fully theme it to look exactly how you like
• Awesome bulk opener functionality to open tens of Jira, Linear, TestRail or other ids in 1 go.

🚀 Recent Updates: 

2026-02-16: v3.1.0
• Extension is now open source. Also made all features free.
• Fixed compact tabs where enter/space wouldn't select them
• Fixed issue with discord's favicon not appearing
• Fixed issue with 

2026-01-23:
• Added a fully featured bulk links opener in the menu (click 3 dots in the top bar to use it). 
• Made it possible to copy urls of multiple selected tabs or a group
• Added auto light/dark theme based on system and browser setting 
• Made background image configuration free (was premium feature)
• Added ability to have separate dark and light saved presets

Previous updates:
• Made the extension save even more ram by adding native tab discarding (enabled by default)
• Added ability to drag to move tabs/groups between to other windows
• Made workspaces feature more reliable and performant
• Fully native suspending system which saves the most ram and gives you the most control
• Added the ability to assign a hotkey for a workspace
• Added setting to search all workspaces or single workspace
• Added ability to drag tab/group to workspace icon to move it there
• Added ability to rename and change the icon of all workspaces
• Added the Workspaces feature so you can categorize tabs easily (Enable it in settings)
• Hid the search bar by default but you can still search by just typing anywhere in the sidebar
• Numerous improvements & fixes implemented

Release notes are on the subreddit: /r/SharpTabs!

===== 🔥 Main Features 🔥 =====


✨ Useful AI Features (Free with bring your own Gemini key)

• Tab Grouping - Intelligently organize your tabs with a customizable prompt!
• Tab Cleanup - Looks and lists tabs you might want to close
• Group Naming - Create a group and it gets named automatically


🔍 Tab Search - Never lose track of your tabs again

• Instant Search - Start typing anywhere in the sidebar or popup for immediate 
results
• Easy Keyboard Navigation - Use arrow keys or tab/shift+tab to navigate in tabs list
• Quick search commands: Alt + T to open the pop up > Type > Select Tab > Enter


🌙 Tab Sleeping - Speed up your PC & keep tabs organized

• Auto-Suspend - Intelligently suspend tabs after a set inactivity time
• Smart Whitelist - Configure which sites/tabs to never suspend
• Rock Solid - Never breaks or loses any of your tabs (unlike others)


🎨 Complete Customization - Make the sidebar and popup look awesome!

• Tons of themes and background images/gradients possibilities
• Compatibility with tweakcn.com for unlimited themes
• Full Custom CSS customization allowed
• Compact pinned tabs mode (just shows them as icons)
• Complete customization of the context menu
• Slim Side Panel Mode + Expand on hover (for Vivaldi only)


💾 Session Backups - Never lose your tabs again!

• Auto-Backup - Automatic backups every 10 minutes when tabs change
• Granular Restore - Restore sessions, windows, groups, or individual tabs
• Cross-Browser - Easily export and import sessions between browsers
• Lightning Fast - Instant session restoration, faster than other extensions 


🏠 Workspaces - Categorize your tabs into different topics

• Easily create and reorganize the Workspaces
• Drag tabs and groups onto a workspace's icon to move them there
• Search in a single workspace or in all your workspaces (setting)


⌨️ Keyboard - Shortcuts Navigate your tabs like a pro

• Comprehensive Hotkeys - Extensive list of keyboard shortcuts for every action
• Go to Next & Previous Tab - Get work done faster!
• Customizable - Configure shortcuts to match your workflow

A lot more features and settings that I didn't mention here!
iWeaver AI -  Summarize YouTube, PDF and Web Articles.
Summarize YouTube videos, Web articles and PDFs with one click, intelligently generate mind maps, and chat with iWeaver AI.

Overview

iWeaver AI can collect any web articles  and summarize YouTube, PDF, web articles and MP3.

Summarize YouTube videos, online articles and PDFs with one click, intelligently generate mind maps, and chat with iWeaver AI. Record timestamps and screenshot notes. Highlight text on any web page. Quickly collect key points of web to build own personal knowledge system. 

For more details, please visit our website: https://www.iweaver.ai.

🎉 Key Features:

● Time-saving: Quickly select and save to your personal knowledge base with just one click.
● Insightful: Define your online content summary for a fast related topics.
● Transcription Empowerment: Record intelligent notes with video or audio timestamps and capture screenshots effortlessly.
● AI Chat: Pose challenging questions to iWeaver AI and receive in-depth answers about specific content or your whole knowledge base.
● Web Summaries: one-click for a webpage overview summary, with word definition function for precise key point understanding.
● Mind Map: Smartly Generate exportable Mind Maps for visual Knowledge Expansion.
● AI Translation: Get content key points without language barriers once and for all.
● AI Driven Knowledge Reusage: Any content you saved could be recalled and reused for content creation like articles, summaries, Q&As, abstracts, emails, and more.

👉🏻 How to Use:
● Visit any website to get information.
● Click the icon of iWeaver at the top right of your Chrome browser.
● Click on the "Summarize" button to get quick insights of this page's content.
● Type your questions or commands in the chatbox to engage in intelligent conversations with iWeaver AI to get answers or create tasks.
● Click on the "Memo" option to see automatically saved content, or add labels to it.
● Click on the "AI Chat" tab  Access this page through recommended questions on the "Summary" page.
● Select specific content on the page to save and collect.

Transform your online content and knowledge acquiring experience with iWeaver AI! 🚀
SponsorKliks is a free sponsor concept for sport clubs and other non-profits.

Download eenmalig de SponsorKliks Extensie en vergeet nooit meer jouw favoriete vereniging/stichting te sponsoren. 

Gebruik alleen deze door de meewerkende webwinkels geautoriseerde browserextensie!

Andere browserextensies worden NIET door SponsorKliks ondersteund/goedgekeurd en dus ook niet door de webwinkels die in deze (ongeautoriseerde) extensies zijn opgenomen! 

Door een eigen browserextensie voor jouw vereniging/stichting te maken loop je het risico dat SponsorKliks genoodzaakt is de samenwerking met de betreffende vereniging/stichting te staken. Download dus alleen deze "legale" browserextensie!

LET OP! Wanneer je naar een andere pagina gaat dan de homepage van de webwinkel (dus bijvoorbeeld naar een productpagina binnen deze webwinkel), dan zal deze extensie jouw bezoek doorsturen naar de homepage van de betreffende webshop. 

Dit is helaas niet anders in te stellen. U dient dus daarna nogmaals de betreffende pagina binnen de webshop te bezoeken.
Pro Sender - Free Bulk WhatsApp Sender
Free WhatsApp bulk sender for marketing automation. Send unlimited messages, images, videos to multiple contacts.

Use Pro WhatsApp Sender - Bulk WhatsApp Sender to easily manage your WhatsApp Business communication and connect with your customers by sending bulk messages and translating chats in real-time.

Features
* Send Bulk WhatsApp Messages: Quickly send personalized messages, images, videos, and documents to multiple contacts at once.
* Excel Integration: Import your contact list from Excel and send messages in bulk.
* Save Message Templates: Create and reuse message templates for your promotions.
* Schedule Campaigns: Set up campaigns, track progress, and pause or resume anytime.
* Real-Time Translation: Instantly translate your chats into different languages.
* Group Contact Extraction: Collect contacts from WhatsApp groups in seconds.
* Privacy Options: Blur your chats for added privacy.
* Supports All Major Languages: Reach your audience, no matter where they are.

Try the safest Pro WhatsApp Sender to send bulk messages on WhatsApp and speed up your WhatsApp marketing now!

If you like Pro WhatsApp Sender, show us more love with a nice review. It really helps.

Disclaimer: WhatsApp is a trademark of WhatsApp Inc., registered in the U.S. and other countries.  Pro WhatsApp Sender is an independent project and has no relationship to WhatsApp or WhatsApp Inc.
Unlocks your company's knowledge and enables powerful work AI for everyone.

The Glean browser extension unlocks your company’s knowledge and enables powerful work AI for everyone. Just hit Command + J or Alt + J on Windows to instantly access Glean from anywhere:

💡 Know what your company knows, instantly with the Glean sidebar
* Discover: Glean delivers personalized content recommendations tailored to your current work context, surfacing relevant insights without you having to search.
* Chat: Ask questions and get instant answers from an AI Assistant that understand both your current content and your entire company knowledge base.
* Search: Find exactly what you need with intelligent search that understands context, connects related information, and identifies relevant experts.
* With a simple Command + J on Mac or Alt + J on Windows - instantly summarize information from any work application

⚡️ Get quick access to the work resources you need.
* Glean’s new tab page puts all of your company’s knowledge at your fingertips
* See recommended documents, notifications from across applications, access calendar events, and more.
* Use Glean’s Go Links feature to instantly access even the most complex URLs

—

Glean connects with dozens of popular workplace apps like Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, Slack, and more. Use this extension if you have an account created by your company admin.

Questions? Visit https://help.glean.com or learn more at https://www.glean.com

Learn more about the permissions we ask for: https://help.glean.com/en/articles/3643260-why-does-the-chrome-extension-ask-for-those-permissions

Monitors a student's browsing data and keeps them on task.

VCS Surelock is the Chromebook monitoring solution designed for Vancouver Christian School (https://vancs.org). Surelock helps teachers see the browsing activity of a student easily and securely.

Surelock's features are:

1. Seeing a student's full browsing history for the entire school year across all devices
2. Seeing a student's browsing activity in realtime
3. Running commands on a student's device in realtime such as:
       a. Opening, closing, and switching tabs
       b. Sending messages to the student's device
       c. Sending spoken messages to the student's device
       c. Locking the student's device
       d. Setting a tab limit for the student's device
       e. Creating quizzes/tests for the student (prevents student from using computer 
            until quiz/test ends)

These features make it easy for a teacher to protect students as they browse the web and it gives the teacher full control over the student's internet usage.

Multiple planets you can choose what you like and custom them. support custom the clock style and compatible with Vimkey.

Use realm to :
• • •

⚡ Instant Access Resources
Access curated lists instantly with a click. No need to toggle between multiple accounts or search Google. Quickly access all your email accounts from a single list.

📂Organize Information in the Realm
Create multiple workplaces and organize them using various widgets like folders or curated lists within a specific realm.

🎉 How to Organize
---Workplaces: Set up distinct workplaces for different projects or teams.

⏳ Enhance Workflow Efficiency

Smart bookmark recommendations after you save a page.

Short Description:
FlowMark intelligently organizes your bookmarks and tabs, suggesting optimal bookmark folders and providing efficient tab management.

Detailed Description:

Introduction
FlowMark is a powerful browser extension designed to streamline your browsing experience by intelligently managing your bookmarks and tabs. Say goodbye to cluttered bookmarks and chaotic tab management - FlowMark helps you stay organized with minimal effort.

Key Features:

1. Smart Bookmark Organization
- Intelligent Folder Recommendations: When saving new bookmarks, FlowMark analyzes your existing bookmark structure and the page content to suggest the most appropriate folder.
- Non-Intrusive Suggestions: We respect your organizational preferences - FlowMark provides recommendations without changing your existing bookmark structure.
- Seamless Integration: Works naturally with Chrome's native bookmarking flow, adding intelligence without disrupting your browsing habits.

2. Efficient Tab Management
- Tab Sets: Group related tabs together for different projects or work contexts.
- Quick Navigation: Easily switch between tab sets to maintain focus on your current task.
- Reduced Browser Load: Keep your browser running smoothly by loading only the tabs you need for your current activity.
- Convenient Access: Use keyboard shortcut Ctrl/Cmd+B to quickly access the tab management interface.

How to Use:

Smart Bookmark Organization:
1. Click the bookmark icon in your address bar as usual
2. When the native bookmark dialog appears, FlowMark will automatically suggest the most appropriate folder
3. Accept the suggestion or choose your own folder as preferred
4. Your bookmark is saved in the optimal location without any extra steps

Tab Management:
1. Press Ctrl/Cmd+B to open the tab management interface
2. Name your tab set based on your current activity (e.g., "Work Project", "Research", "Personal")
3. Add current tabs to your tab set
4. Switch between tab sets anytime through the same interface (Ctrl/Cmd+B)
5. Enjoy a clutter-free browsing experience with only the tabs you need

Privacy & Security:
- Local Processing: All data processing happens locally on your device
- No Data Collection: Your browsing data never leaves your browser
- Minimal Permissions: FlowMark only requests the permissions necessary for its functionality

Support & Feedback:
We're constantly improving FlowMark based on user feedback. If you have suggestions, questions, or encounter any issues, please contact us at blushyes@gmail.com.

Enhance your browsing productivity today with FlowMark - the intelligent bookmark and tab manager!

Vimmatic enables Vim-like key binds in your web browser for easier and faster navigation.

This extension enables you to navigate pages, switch tabs, and open a site you want with your keyboard.  The extension provides a Vim-like experience on your browser and a new choice for Vim users.  You can configure keymaps and browse pages with your preferences.

# Quick start

After installation, you can control Firefox with vim-like keymaps. To scroll a page in the browser, press `k`, `j`, `h` and `l` keys. You can scroll to the top or the bottom of a page by `gg` and `G`.  To select a left and right of current tab, use `K` and `J` respectively. To close current tab, use `d` and to restore closed tabs, use `u`.  To open a link, press `f` to enter the follow mode to select a link. Then you can select links by alphabetic keys.

Vimmatic supports command line to run commands that control tabs and opens a tab. To open command line, press `:`.  To open a tab with URL, use `open` command.  You can select completed items by `Tab` and `Shift`+`Tab`

For usage and more detailed information, check out our documentation:
https://ueokande.github.io/vimmatic/

The development of Vimmatic is publically available as open-source software.  Feel free to contact us at github.com:
https://github.com/ueokande/vimmatic

Altera o título da aba com base nos favoritos do navegador.

Esta extensão resolve a ambiguidade de trabalhar com múltiplas abas do Sankhya OM que exibem o título genérico "Sankhya OM".

Com a descontinuação do navegador Sankhya, esta ferramenta foi desenvolvida para replicar a funcionalidade essencial de identificação de ambiente em navegadores de mercado, como o Chrome.

A ferramenta identifica a URL da página atual e a compara com as URLs salvas nos Favoritos do navegador. Se um favorito correspondente for encontrado (ex: "Cliente X - Produção"), a extensão altera o título da aba para refletir o nome desse favorito.

Isso permite que usuários, consultores e analistas identifiquem de forma clara e imediata os diferentes ambientes de trabalho, como Teste (TST) e Produção (PRD), ou diferenciem múltiplos clientes, melhorando a organização do fluxo de trabalho.

Esta extensão é uma ferramenta independente e não possui afiliação oficial com a Sankhya.

You save it, Markly sorts it — AI-powered smart bookmark manager

Save bookmarks effortlessly — Markly uses AI to analyze pages and auto-organize them into the right folders. Smart, fast, and free.

Stop wasting time organizing bookmarks. Let AI do it for you.

Every time you save a bookmark, you face the same question: "Which folder does this go in?" Markly answers it instantly. Just press Ctrl+D — Markly's AI
reads the page, understands its content, and files it in the perfect folder. No dragging, no scrolling, no thinking.

Why install Markly?

Your browser's built-in bookmark manager hasn't changed in years. Bookmarks pile up in "Other Bookmarks" or random folders, and finding anything later is a
nightmare. Markly fixes this by making every bookmark organized from the moment you save it.

How it works

1. Visit any page and press Ctrl+D (or click the Markly icon)
2. AI analyzes the page title, description, and content
3. Markly recommends the best folder — confirm with one click, or let it save automatically

That's it. No setup, no folder management, no busywork.

Key Features

★ AI-Powered Classification — Automatically picks the right folder based on page content
★ Two Save Modes — Auto mode (zero clicks) or Manual mode (you confirm the AI's pick)
★ Quick Save — Press Ctrl+Shift+D to instantly save to your last-used folder
★ Smart Duplicate Detection — Warns you if a page is already bookmarked elsewhere
★ Full Bookmark Manager — Browse, search, move, rename, and delete bookmarks from the side panel
★ Save History — See everything you've saved, grouped by date, filterable by mode
★ Custom Rules — Tell the AI your preferences (e.g., "Put all GitHub repos in Dev/Open Source")
★ Right-Click Save — Save any page via the context menu
★ Dark Mode — Follows your system theme, or set it manually
★ Bilingual — Available in English and 中文

Keyboard Shortcuts

• Ctrl+D — Open Markly overlay with AI analysis
• Ctrl+Shift+D — Quick save to last folder
• Ctrl+B — Toggle side panel

Free to Use

Markly includes 50 free AI classifications. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited analyses, deep content analysis, and priority support.

Privacy First

Markly only reads page content when you explicitly trigger a save or analysis. No background tracking, no browsing history collection, no ads.

Perfect for

• Researchers saving dozens of references daily
• Developers bookmarking docs, repos, and Stack Overflow answers
• Students organizing study materials across subjects
• Anyone tired of messy, unsorted bookmarks

Start organizing smarter — install Markly today.
Adds a bookmark with the current time

A great way to know the time without having to look down at the dock. Especially useful if you have the dock set to autohide.

Will update a bookmark with the current time, in your local time zone.

To use:
1) Press the extension icon
2) Click "new"
3) Click "turn on"
4) Open or reload any tab other than chrome.google.com or any chrome:// or edge://
5) Enjoy

New:
This will create a new bookmark, titled "Clock," where the time will appear, in your bookmark bar. You can move this bookmark anywhere you like, but I recommend keeping it in the main bookmark bar. If you cannot see any bookmarks, press CTRL + SHIFT + B to enable the bookmark bar. You can press this multiple times and every bookmark created will work.

Turn On/Off:
Toggles the bookmark updating. Allows you to edit or open bookmarks in the bookmarks bar, or if it is distracting.

***
Important Info:
If you have no existing bookmarks the "new" button doesn't work.
Does not work on system tabs (chrome://, etc)
Syncs with every device you are signed into.
No user data is collected at all.

FAQ:
HELP I CAN'T LOOK IN BOOKMARK FOLDERS OR RIGHT CLICK BOOKMARKS:
 - Turn off the extension by clicking the icon and clicking "turn off." You can turn it back on whenever.
